Hero.title: Ride the wave
Hero.subtitle: Nalu AI is not software you install. It's an ML system we build together for you — on your data, your infrastructure, your processes.

WasNaluIst.headline: Demand planning and sales intelligence —
WasNaluIst.headlineSecond: in one system, on your infrastructure.
WasNaluIst.body:
Nalu AI connects your ERP data with machine learning — and delivers forecasts, SCM recommendations and AI reports that update automatically every day.

No cloud dependency. No shared data. Your infrastructure, your control.

Massgeschneidert.headline: Every implementation is different.
Massgeschneidert.col1Body: Nalu AI learns your SKUs, your seasonality, your ERP quirks.
Massgeschneidert.col2Body: SAP, S/4HANA, Dynamics, Proalpha, CSV — we build the connector for your system.
Massgeschneidert.col3Body: We go live when you're ready. Typical: 4–8 weeks.

Referenz.quote: "The applications he developed have become a permanent part of our daily operations."
Referenz.author: CEO

Module.headline: Everything in one system.
Module.footnote: * Available when customer data is present
Module.scmBody: Safety stock and reorder points are calculated from forecast and service level. The moment an SKU drops below ROP, purchasing and planning see the alert with stock, coverage days and severity — optionally pushed to Slack, Teams or email.
Module.forecastingBody:
LightGBM and Temporal Fusion Transformer —
trained on the customer's real item data,
not on generic templates.

Every forecast shows P10/P50/P90 confidence intervals,
SHAP explanations and the recommended order date —
automatically calculated from forecast and lead time.

Zusatzleistungen.headline: What else I build.
Zusatzleistungen.subline: Nalu AI is my main product — but not the only thing I develop.
Zusatzleistungen.card1Body: Pipelines from SAP, SQL Server, heterogeneous source systems. Automated, production-ready, maintainable.
Zusatzleistungen.card2Body: Forecasting models, classification, anomaly detection — trained on your data, not on demos.
Zusatzleistungen.card3Body: FastAPI, Flask, REST interfaces. From concept to deployment on your infrastructure.
Zusatzleistungen.card4Body: DuckDB, PostgreSQL, Parquet pipelines. For companies without a central data foundation or with grown structures.
Zusatzleistungen.preisNote: Pricing in a personal conversation — every project is different.

KontaktCTA.headline: Talk to me.
KontaktCTA.subline: No form. No funnel. Just an email.

About.metaDescription: Nalu AI builds tailored demand intelligence systems for mid-market companies — on their own infrastructure, without cloud dependency.
About.headerSubtitle: Nalu AI develops ML systems for demand planning and sales intelligence — not as software you install, but as a solution built together with the customer. On their data, their infrastructure, their processes.
About.wasTitle: Not SaaS. Not a consulting project.
About.wasBody:
Nalu AI is a demand intelligence platform tailored to each customer. Forecasts, SCM recommendations and AI reports run on the customer's own infrastructure — no shared data, no external cloud, no black box.

The platform is built on proven technology from production use: LightGBM and Temporal Fusion Transformer for forecasts, DuckDB for analytical queries, FastAPI as the API layer, Docker for deployment. What works stays — what matters in mid-market gets added.
About.wasNot1Body: Every implementation learns the customer's SKUs, seasonalities and ERP quirks — no standard templates.
About.wasNot2Body: On-premise by design. No cloud lock-in, no subprocessor chain, no hidden APIs.
About.wasNot3Body: One Docker Compose stack per customer. What is not needed does not run. What runs, runs fast.
About.methodikSubline: From the first conversation to production — typically 4 to 8 weeks.
About.step1Body: Short workshop with the customer: ERP system, data structure, business logic, biggest pain points. Out of it comes a config.yaml — the heart of every implementation.
About.step2Body: Integration with SAP, S/4HANA, Dynamics, Proalpha, SQL or CSV — read-only, no changes to the source system. Data quality is validated automatically, gaps detected.
About.step3Body: ML models are trained on the customer's real data. Forecast accuracy is transparently measured (MAPE, coverage) before anything goes into production.
About.step4Body: Docker stack runs on the customer's server. RBAC, 2FA, audit log and SSL are standard. Training for purchasing, planning and sales.
About.step5Body: Weekly retraining, automatic reports, monitoring. Updates, new features and support are part of the license — not an upcharge.
About.prinzipienTitle: Four things Nalu AI measures itself against.
About.p1Body: On-premise is not a feature, it is a requirement. No cloud dependency, no subprocessor chain, no external model APIs.
About.p2Body: Forecasts, alerts and reports the team can use tomorrow. No generic AI buzzwords — confidence intervals, SHAP explanations, honest numbers.
About.p3Body: Deterministic pipelines, documented configuration, readable models. Whoever has to touch the system in three years should not have to guess.
About.p4Body: Tight resources, legacy systems, pragmatic decisions. The platform is built for that — not for enterprises with their own data team.
About.kontaktSubline: No form. No funnel. Just an email.

Leistungen.metaDescription: Nalu AI and more — data integration, custom ML, backend development and data architecture. Tailored, production-ready, maintainable.
Leistungen.headerSubtitle: Alongside Nalu AI, individual solutions are built for data integration, machine learning and backend development — tailored, production-ready, maintainable.
Leistungen.hauptBody: ML forecasting, supply chain and sales intelligence — on-premise, tailored for mid-market companies.
Leistungen.refBody: Built for a mid-market food producer — a full ML forecasting platform on top of SAP data.
Leistungen.refStack: Python · LightGBM · FastAPI · DuckDB · React · Docker · SAP
Leistungen.refQuote: "The applications developed have become a permanent part of our daily operations."
Leistungen.card1Body: Pipelines from SAP, SQL Server, heterogeneous source systems. Automated, production-ready, maintainable.
Leistungen.card2Body: Forecasting models, classification, anomaly detection — trained on real production data.
Leistungen.card3Body: FastAPI, Flask, REST interfaces. From concept to deployment on your own infrastructure.
Leistungen.card4Body: DuckDB, PostgreSQL, Parquet pipelines. For companies without a central data foundation or with grown structures.
Leistungen.preisNote: Pricing on request — every project is different.
